evidence: "I love movies based on real life events and this one didn't disappoint."
"If it's found footage of aliens or bigfoot, I'm a happy girl. Loved it!"
"Some of the best movies I have ever watched are those which start slowly and immediately pick up speed and grab your whole attention."
"Really a good movie. No drop outs or slow spots, simply an entertaining movie."
"I show this at the yearly Halloween party... They camp out in the den and watch these movies over-and-over."
"The fright factor stayed on an even keel throughout the entire film and the ending didn't disappoint!"
"Well made and well filmed, it holds your attention from beginning to end."
"This documentary based on true events was mind-blowing."

brand_loyalty.value: John Wayne, David Bowie, Stephen King
evidence: "I have been a John Wayne fan most of my life..."
"The only one which surpasses it is Misery."
"This was great! I especially liked the ending which left this fan with an X-Files vibe."
"I happened across this found-footage movie... Great movie! Well made, good plot...just an excellent watch."
"This film is as much a documentary as movie."
"Thoroughly enjoyed watching one of my favorite movies once more..."

summary: The user has a strong preference for documentaries and found footage films, particularly those based on real-life events. They appreciate well-made movies with engaging plots and a fast pace, while also showing loyalty to iconic figures like John Wayne and Stephen King.
